name: workpulse-hrms
description: WorkPulse HRMS — employee attendance and HR management platform. Developed by Abdul Manan.
author: Abdul Manan

scripts.desktop:build:staging: npx cross-env APP_ENV=staging npm run tauri build --prefix desktop-app
scripts.desktop:build:prod: npx cross-env APP_ENV=production npm run tauri build --prefix desktop-app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix mobile-app && npm run typecheck --prefix admin-panel
